# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cicd security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Secure Build and Deploy

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      environment:
        description: 'Deployment environment'
        required: true
        type: choice
        options:
          - development
          - staging
          - production
      approved_build_script:
        description: 'Approved build script name'
        required: true
        type: choice
        options:
          - maven-build
          - gradle-build
          - npm-build
          - docker-build

permissions:
  contents: read
  pull-requests: read

jobs:
  security-scan:
    runs-on: [self-hosted, security-scanner]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
          
      - name: Scan for secrets
        uses: trufflesecurity/trufflehog@main
        with:
          extra_args: --only-verified
          
      - name: Static code analysis
        run: |
          /opt/security-tools/code-scanner.sh

  validate-and-build:
    needs: security-scan
    runs-on: [self-hosted, build-runner]
    environment: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'development' }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha || github.sha }}
          
      - name: Validate build configuration
        run: |
          if [ ! -f ".github/approved-scripts/${{ github.event.inputs.approved_build_script || 'maven-build' }}.sh" ]; then
            echo "Error: Build script not in approved list"
            exit 1
          fi
          
      - name: Set up isolated build environment
        run: |
          sudo -n /usr/local/bin/setup-build-container.sh
          
      - name: Execute approved build script
        run: |
          SCRIPT_NAME="${{ github.event.inputs.approved_build_script || 'maven-build' }}"
          APPROVED_SCRIPT="/opt/approved-build-scripts/${SCRIPT_NAME}.sh"
          
          if [ ! -f "$APPROVED_SCRIPT" ]; then
            echo "Error: Approved script not found"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          chmod +x "$APPROVED_SCRIPT"
          "$APPROVED_SCRIPT"
        timeout-minutes: 30
        env:
          BUILD_ENV: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'development' }}
          
      - name: Verify build artifacts
        run: |
          /opt/security-tools/artifact-scanner.sh ./build/
          
      - name: Upload artifacts to secure storage
        run: |
          /usr/local/bin/secure-artifact-upload.sh \
            --source ./build/ \
            --destination "s3://secure-artifacts/${{ github.repository }}/${{ github.sha }}" \
            --sign \
            --encrypt

  deploy:
    needs: validate-and-build
    if: github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'
    runs-on: [self-hosted, deploy-runner]
    environment: 
      name: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}
      url: https://${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}.example.com
    steps:
      - name: Download verified artifacts
        run: |
          /usr/local/bin/secure-artifact-download.sh \
            --source "s3://secure-artifacts/${{ github.repository }}/${{ github.sha }}" \
            --destination ./artifacts/ \
            --verify-signature \
            --decrypt
            
      - name: Execute approved deployment
        run: |
          ENV="${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}"
          DEPLOY_SCRIPT="/opt/approved-deploy-scripts/deploy-${ENV}.sh"
          
          if [ ! -f "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" ]; then
            echo "Error: Approved deployment script not found"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          chmod +x "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
          "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" ./artifacts/
        timeout-minutes: 15
        
      - name: Verify deployment
        run: |
          /opt/deployment-tools/health-check.sh \
            --environment "${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}" \
            --timeout 300
            
      - name: Notify deployment status
        if: always()
        run: |
          /usr/local/bin/notify-deployment.sh \
            --status "${{ job.status }}" \
            --environment "${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}" \
            --commit "${{ github.sha }}"
